chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.1419 of 2024 Cr. Bail Appl. No. 2384 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 13.01.2025 Mr. Salman Mujahid, advocate for applicants a/w applicant in Cr. Bail Appl. No.1419/2024. Syed Mehtab Advocate for complainant. Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: By this order, pre arrest bail application and post arrest bail application are disposed of having been filed in Crime No.123/2024 U/s 324, 114, 34 PPC of P.S. Mauripur, Karachi. Applicant Zohaib Nabil in Cr. Bail Application No.2384/2024 is seeking pre arrest bail, who is present on ad-interim pre arrest bail, whereas in Cr. Bail Application No.1419 applicant is seeking post arrest bail in the same crime. 2. As per FIR, it is alleged that a party was going on in a hut No.N-27 Manora Road, Sandspit, Mauripur Road, Karachi, where on account of some dispute, security guards of applicant Zohaib Nabil started firing hitting thrice on waste of a friend of complainant namely Mazeen s/o Rehan, hence FIR. 3. Learned counsel in defence has submitted that in the investigation both the applicants have been exonerated by the police stating that complainant has failed to produce any evidence establishing alleged role of the applicants. On the contrary firing at the party has been attributed to complainant himself and one Shahzaib, who is absconder. Even the injured in his 161 Cr.P.C. statement has not specifically attributed role of firing to both the applicants. These facts have been forwarded by learned defence counsel in arguments which have been rebutted by learned counsel for complainant.

Even the injured in his 161 Cr.P.C. statement has not specifically attributed role of firing to both the applicants. These facts have been forwarded by learned defence counsel in arguments which have been rebutted by learned counsel for complainant. However, learned APG has conceded that in view of investigation report a case of further inquiry against applicants has been made out. 4. In view of above assertion of learned APG, these applications are allowed. The ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to applicant Zohaib Nabil in Cr. Bail Appl. No.2384/2024 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions, whereas applicant Laiq Zaman in Cr. Bail Application No.1419 of 2024 is granted post arrest bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The bail applications are disposed of. J U D G E A.K
